description: Build out of existing space. Shift restrooms back. add kitchen in existing space. add cooler area to building.

Our company, King Cole Construction, conducted an investigation of the building and identified significant rust and deterioration in the walkway framing beneath the walkways. In response, we installed a temporary support structure to stabilize the affected areas. Subsequently, the building association retained a structural engineer, who visited the site and developed a comprehensive repair plan. We respectfully request expedited review and approval to begin the necessary repairs as soon as possible.
